Harvard Film Archive.title: Valerie and Her Week of Wonders
Harvard Film Archive.synopsis: Written by Ester Krumbachová on the basis of Vítězslav Nezval’s 1935 gothic novel, Valerie and Her Week of Wonders sees post-‘68 Czech cinema move firmly into surrealism, spiritualism and the occult. Jireš—whose 1969’s The Joke encountered the iron fist of censorship—was somehow allowed to direct after Barrandov Studio…

Classical Music (Boston).title: Milton Community Concerts – Celebrating Asian Composers and Performers
Classical Music (Boston).synopsis: 7 Asian classically-trained musicians performing a wide variety of music written by Asian composers, as well as showpieces by Western composers. Donations accepted at the concert will support the Asian Community Fund at the Boston Foundation.
